PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Jul-25-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Anthony Regner specially appearing for Gordon Bones for (petitioner) Bert Parkinson.

Mr. Regner reported that an amended petition was filed on 7/22/16 and that he was just contacted regarding the case. The Court stated that the last filing it has is June 1, 2016. Mr. Regner stated that he was told that they filed an amended petition on 7/22/16 and that they would like a continuance. The Court stated that it is taking the Petition for Probate of Will and Letters Testamentary off calendar.

Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Aug-19-2015 Continued To Dec-09-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Mapes in Propria Persona. Caroline Hinshaw for Bonnie Schindhelm.

Ms. Hinshaw stated that she received an email from Mr. Mapes regarding a meet and confer, that the depositions are not complete as of yet and that they need a 90 day continuance before setting for trial. The Petition for Letters of administration with will annexed and the petition for letters of administration were continued to December 9, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court expects that the parties will have met and conferred regarding issues for trial as well as length of trial by this date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-19-2015 Continued To Dec-09-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar May-13-2015 Continued To Aug-19-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Mapes in Propria Persona. Caroline Hinshaw for (petitioner) Bonnie Schindhelm.

The Court stated that the parties were to have talked about issues and how to resolve them. Ms. Hinshaw stated that she has provided a string of title returning the property to Ms. O'Donnell. Mr. Mapes stated that he has a copy of the trust instrument and has provided a copy to Ms. Hinshaw. Ms. Hinshaw reported that both parties agree that discovery is necessary and that the beneficiary at the time consented to the transfer of property back to Mr. O'Donnell. Mr. Mapes stated that the beneficiary says she signed the paper and has no interest in making a claim. The Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed and the Petition for Letters of Administration were continued to August 19, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The parties are to meet and confer, conduct discovery and decide on a mediation or litigation schedule prior to this date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputies Lopes & Santiago. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar May-13-2015 Continued To Aug-19-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Apr-01-2015 Continued To May-13-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Mapes in Propria Persona. Caroline Hinshaw for (petitioner/objector) Bonnie Schindhelm.

Ms. Hinshaw reported that she has been ill the last two weeks, filed replies this morning, that the 1st isssue is the property and that if the joint tenancy is valid there is no estate. Mr. Mapes stated that there are two legal issues; did the family court property order sever the joint tenancy and did the decedent intend for joint tenancy. The court stated there is a question as to if the will is valid or not and asked about the declaration of Mr. Parkinson indicating that he has revoked the irrevocable trust. Mr. Mapes stated that he worked on the declaration with Mr. Parkinson, that he has a copy of the trust but has not read it and that he could provide a copy to the court. Ms. Hinshaw stated that she would need to review the trust as well. The court stated that the matter will be continued for the parties to meet and confer, share information, reach an agreement on participation in mediation and what agreements can be reached. The petition for letters of administration with will annexed and the petition for letters of administration were continued to May 13, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)
